content.explanation:
**Day 75 — Complete Mock Test + Final Revision 🏁**

**यह आपका आखिरी दिन है — 75 Hard English का समापन!**

**MOCK TEST STRUCTURE:**

**Section A: Grammar (40 marks)**
1. Fill in the blanks with correct tense (10 Q × 2 = 20)
2. Correct the errors (5 Q × 2 = 10)
3. Voice change: Active ↔ Passive (5 Q × 2 = 10)

**Section B: Vocabulary (20 marks)**
1. Match idioms with meanings (5 Q × 2 = 10)
2. Fill in professional vocabulary (5 Q × 2 = 10)

**Section C: Writing (20 marks)**
1. Write a leave application (10 marks)
2. Write a paragraph on 'Benefits of Learning English' (10 marks)

**Section D: Speaking (20 marks)**
1. Self-introduction (2 min) = 10 marks
2. Speak on a given topic for 2 min = 10 marks

**Total: 100 Marks**
✅ 90-100 = Excellent 🏆
✅ 75-89 = Very Good 🥈
✅ 60-74 = Good 🥉
✅ Below 60 = Revise more and retake!
rules: All grammar rules: from Day 1 basics to Day 52 advanced structures
All 12 tenses: use correctly with appropriate time expressions
Modal verbs: can/could, should/should have, must/must have, may/might, will/would
Writing skills: application, letter, email, notice, paragraph formats
Vocabulary: irregular verbs, idioms, professional words, categories
Speaking: confidence, clarity, correct grammar, good vocabulary
content.memoryTrick:
**🏁 75-DAY ACHIEVEMENT UNLOCKED! 🏁**

You have learned:
✅ 12 Tenses | ✅ All Modal Verbs
✅ Active & Passive Voice | ✅ Conditionals
✅ 200+ Vocabulary Words | ✅ Idioms & Phrases
✅ 5 Writing Formats | ✅ Professional English

**Remember: English is not just a language — it's a superpower! 💪**
Speak daily, make mistakes, learn, improve. That is the ONLY formula!

examples.hindi: Grammar Test Sample: वह 2020 से यहाँ है।
examples.english: She has been here since 2020. ✅ (NOT: She is here since 2020)

examples.hindi: Voice Change: राम ने खाना बनाया।
examples.english: Active: Ram cooked the food. → Passive: The food was cooked by Ram. ✅

examples.hindi: Idiom: He hit the nail on the head.
examples.english: Meaning: He said exactly the right thing. ✅
If it rains, I will stay home. (1st Conditional) ✅

examples.hindi: Professional vocab: हमें project deploy करना है।
examples.english: We need to deploy the project by Friday. ✅

mistakes.wrong: If I would study, I will pass.
mistakes.correct: If I study, I will pass. (1st conditional)
mistakes.why: First conditional: If + Present → will (not 'would study')

mistakes.correct: The work has been done. (Present Perfect Passive)
mistakes.why: 'Is been' is wrong — Present Perfect Passive = 'has/have been + V3'
Stative verbs (know, want, love) never use -ing form

speakingTips: आज full mock test दो — बिना help के सब खुद करो!
After the test: review every mistake and understand why you got it wrong.
From Day 76 onwards: Speak English for at least 30 minutes every single day. The real practice starts now!

vocabulary.example: Completing 75 days is a great achievement!
Your perseverance brought you to Day 75.
You are on the path to becoming fluent.
You are now proficient in English.
Be consistent — speak English every day.

practice.hindi: मैंने यह 75-दिन का चैलेंज पूरा कर लिया है।
alternatives: i have finished the 75 days hard english course.
practice.hint: have completed = पूरा कर लिया है

practice.hindi: मुझे अपनी अंग्रेज़ी पर गर्व है।
practice.english: I am proud of my English.
alternatives: i take pride in my english skills.
practice.hint: I am proud of = मुझे गर्व है

practice.hindi: मैं अब fluently अंग्रेज़ी बोल सकता हूँ।
practice.english: I can now speak English fluently.
alternatives: i am now able to speak english with confidence.
practice.hint: can now = अब कर सकता हूँ

practice.hindi: मैंने जो सीखा वह कभी नहीं भूलूँगा।
practice.english: I will never forget what I have learned.
alternatives: i shall always remember my learnings.
practice.hint: will never forget + what + have learned

practice.hindi: मेहनत का फल हमेशा मीठा होता है।
practice.english: The fruits of hard work are always sweet.
alternatives: hard work always pays off.
practice.hint: fruits of hard work = मेहनत का फल

practice.hindi: मैं रोज़ अंग्रेज़ी का अभ्यास जारी रखूँगा।
practice.english: I will continue practising English every day.
alternatives: i will keep practising english daily.

practice.hindi: इस course ने मेरी ज़िंदगी बदल दी।
practice.english: This course has changed my life.
alternatives: this programme has transformed me.
practice.hint: has changed my life = ज़िंदगी बदल दी

practice.hindi: मैं अपने दोस्तों को भी यह course recommend करूँगा।
practice.english: I will also recommend this course to my friends.
alternatives: i will suggest this course to my friends too.

practice.hindi: अंग्रेज़ी बोलने का डर अब मुझे नहीं है।
practice.english: I am no longer afraid of speaking English.
alternatives: i have overcome my fear of english.
practice.hint: no longer afraid of = डर नहीं रहा

practice.hindi: मैं हर situation में अंग्रेज़ी बोल सकता हूँ।
practice.english: I can speak English in every situation.
alternatives: i am confident to speak english anywhere.
practice.hint: in every situation = हर situation में

practice.hindi: मेरे शब्दकोश में हज़ारों नए शब्द जुड़ गए हैं।
practice.english: Thousands of new words have been added to my vocabulary.
alternatives: my vocabulary has expanded by thousands of words.

practice.hindi: मैं किसी भी interview में अंग्रेज़ी दे सकता हूँ।
practice.english: I can give any interview in English.
alternatives: i can face any job interview in english.
practice.hint: can give interview = इंटरव्यू दे सकता हूँ

practice.hindi: यह सिर्फ शुरुआत है, सफर जारी रहेगा।
practice.english: This is just the beginning, the journey will continue.
alternatives: this is only the start, i will keep going.

practice.hindi: मैं हर दिन बेहतर होता जाऊँगा।
practice.english: I will get better every day.
alternatives: i will improve with each passing day.

practice.english: 75 days of hard work paid off.
alternatives: the efforts of 75 days have finally borne fruit.
practice.hint: paid off = रंग लाई / सफल हुई
